content:
🌟 CodeFormer | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Restoring and enhancing the quality of degraded or low-resolution facial images.
✨ Key Features: • Robust blind face restoration • Codebook Lookup Transformer architecture • Face inpainting • Face color enhancement and restoration • Support for video input
📖 Summary: CodeFormer is a PyTorch-based framework for robust blind face restoration, utilizing a Codebook Lookup Transformer. It excels at enhancing degraded facial images, fixing AI-generated art, and can also perform face inpainting and colorization.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
